{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324005211B0640C19A517A06F9CC8\"}"},"total":8266},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7026222447774925568","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"半架空初唐背景，即不用完全对号入座，又有充分的发挥空间——聪明！语言朴实细腻又不失风趣幽默，尤其是超然物外又不可或缺的旁白更是锦上添花，妙趣横生！布局从家的视角逐渐展开到国与天下的视野！怎么看都是一部佳作！最喜欢作者写的亲情！非常感人！还有童真的可爱也描写的栩栩如生！大赞👍👍！","text_exts":[{"e":133,"s":129,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774284731A06F9CC8%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227026222447774925568%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226900838983991823368%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1635919897,"group_id":"6900838983991823368","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4EAZVj0xVFXTONuDndACvc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776873648\u0026x-signature=PE4Lf3CdmV2eVKh7syh5Tz4y2hU%3D","user_id":"95962942543","user_name":"爱吃脆皮油炸鸡的向薇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95962942543","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"69008389839
